string.description: name of the Banner
resource content will be returned as it was at the time of this git hash
the namespace scope in which to operate
This is the login banner displayed before a user has logged into the Node.
This is the MOTD banner displayed after a user has logged into the Node.

list.description: Labe selector to select nodes on which to configure the banners.
List of nodes on which to configure the banners.

single_nested.description: BannerSpec allows the configuration of login and MOTD (Message of the Day) banners on selected nodes. The banners can be applied to specific nodes or selected using label selectors.

list.description: List of nodes this banner has been applied to

single_nested.description: BannerStatus defines the observed state of Banner

string.description: a comma-separated list of resource fields to fetch/return.  If unspecified, all fields are fetched.  If empty, only key-fields are fetched.
an EQL "where" expression that will be used to filter the set of resources returned.
A label selector string to filter the results based on resource labels. If specified multiple times, the union of resources which satisfy a label-selector will be returned.
Deprecated: a label selector string to filter the results based on CR labels
the namespace scope in which to operate

int64.description: Configures the Default MTU value for Ethernet interfaces. Includes Ethernet headers but excludes 4-byte FCS trailer.
Configures the Default MTU value for Layer 2 (bridged) interfaces. Includes Ethernet headers but excludes 4-byte FCS trailer.
Configures the Default IP MTU value for Layer 3 interfaces. Includes IP headers but excludes Ethernet headers.

List of nodes on which to configure the defaults.
